# cameraDeviceDidChangeCapability(_:)

**Instance Method**

Tells the client when a capability of a camera changes.

## Declaration

```swift
func cameraDeviceDidChangeCapability(_ camera: ICCameraDevice)
```

## Discussion

For more information about device capabilities, see [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceCapability].
